case_title: CARLOS RUIZ VS. WUILMAN ALFREDO MORAN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, WUILMAN ALFREDO INDIVIDUAL, DBA COSMOS ELECTRIC COMPANY $10,362.90 PRINCIPAL, $1,122.71 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,855.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
